Title: Casting
Description: Blob types can be cast to varchars, producing strings up to 16 MB long.
Nothing can be cast to a blob type.
Casting non-integer values to integers truncates toward 0.
Any data type can be converted to VARBINARY, but the result may not be meaningful.
Datetime values can also be converted to binary and back.
The CAST expression converts the type of scalar_exp into the target data type if possible.
If the conversion is not meaningful, an error is signalled.
CAST is the recommended way of converting between data types, including conversions between strings, numbers, and datetime types.
